transcript.clean_text: stage three of bahinis would be a team time trial with a Twist a 32 kilometer Route Around Don Pierre hombreley but the change would be when the time for each team was taken instead of the third fourth or fifth Rider crossing the line seeing the time taken for the team it would be the first rider for each team that would give the team the time GC times will be taken with each Rider crossing the line on their own an opportunity may be for GC Riders to attack in the final few hundred meters or those Riders who could be stronger give their team a better chance at taking the stage win Lotto destiny were the first to attack the course Jayco a Lula though for the early Flyers the wind was blowing from the side at the start but Jayco Lula used everything to their advantage an early time at the intermediate check was the fastest one and by a long way 22.7 seconds quicker than Bahrain Victorious at that time as today pogacho and Company warmed up to the beat that they'd soon be banging on the pedals lot of Destiny first to finish and a first time set just under 35 minutes 55 kilometers per hour the average time for pogacho then racing with the UAE Emirates team that on paper wasn't quite as strong in the team time trial as Jonas finger goes yombo visma Lula were mightily strong at the Finish Simon Yates and Michael Matthews coming to the line and setting the new fastest time by 43 seconds for a hand score looked okay but when they came to the Finish they couldn't really make an impression on the Australian team's time UA Emirates were looking good as well pogachar attacking in typical style his own teammates this time the victims but also possibly the beneficiaries as the new rules came into effect are able to steal seconds back still just under 20 seconds off of Simon Yates and Jayco alula and David go do though will be looking good in the GC in the next few days he was given an armchair ride to the finished by stiff on Kung second place professionally at that point and then yombo visma came to do their thing inside the flam Rouge and one by one they'd peel off two world-time trial champions in the team a couple of extra national champions as well and the winner of the Tour de France last year three Riders have come to the line together their best place in the GC just two seconds ahead of being agor and a possible Contender for the yellow Jersey at the end of the day four seconds quicker than Jayco alula the Australians bumped off the hot seat yombo visma on their way to a stage win or were they because EF education easy post played a Blinder as well and Magnus Court set off in search of Victory but could only finish 1.4 seconds down on the Dutch team's time Patrick there would be no successful defense of the yellow Jersey for Mars Pearson Matthias skelmosa tried to save the day getting extra seconds back but they finished in eighth place yombo visma just about victors but not quite enough for nothing for hoydong to go into the yellow Jersey that honor went to Magnus Court who leads pahini's by a single second winning the stage EF education easy post second Jayco alula third a Magnus courts becoming the second Dane in 24 hours 53 years after the last one to lead bahrenis the mass Peterson and now Magnus Court in terms of the pogacha and vinegar battle well a handful of seconds between then wingigo switching to be the man with the slide Advantage going into the first uphill finish of this year's race 164.7 kilometers into the Bourgeois region typical parhinis country with a finish at a thousand meters at La guarde so who will take it the yellow Jersey perhaps up for grabs will we see another Magna Scott masterclass in the mountains it will all be live on GCM plus and Discovery Plus foreign
